reviews.review_description: I got this game for my birthday not too long ago, and I wanted to play this with my brother. The game is really nice and the graphics are really cool and I like how you can play sitting or standing and it has multiple views to play. It’s just that whenever I try to go to multiplayer, it will load for a very long time and I don’t know if there is a problem for everyone else because I’m looking at the comments that everybody else made they have different problems. maybe it’s just me, but my multiplayer doesn’t work and I don’t wanna gift the game to my brother if it’s not gonna work for him as well

reviews.review_title: Great but cannot get multiplayer working
reviews.review_description: Really fun like playing with HotWheels, but when clicking on multi-player it loads indefinitely

reviews.review_title: Great game, just needs some tweaking
reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game. I personally love making the car fall, go into a portal, and then into a huge jump. I do however have some recommendations. Number one, make it so that when you go in first person, you see the room around you. I understand that this would be hard, but maybe you could make it like the view you have in the editor when it just shows you the shapes. Number two, add obstacles like swinging hammers, moving platforms, e.t.c. Number 3, add bots that you can race against, as it would make the game a lot more engaging if you don’t have someone to play with. Number 4, it would be nice if you steered with the steering wheel in first person. Other than those four things, the game is super fun and I definitely recommend.
This game is very good .do not hesitate.

All I want is to build track.  Of course they have decided I must FIRST unlock SEVERAL levels of inane, ridiculous races to do so.  Complete waste of money for me.  Wish I could get it back.  I have no intention of going through that nonsense just to find out it’s probably a second rate builder too.

reviews.review_title: Why you should get the game?
reviews.review_description: Because, ￼it’s not as fun when you play at first but once you get the hang of it it’s fun . You should definitely get it. It’s worth the money. ￼

For being mixed reality and the CPU/GPU is throttled and all pieces are movable, it’s impressive how well this game runs and how good it looks! PBR rendering, shadows, particles, and pretty UI. Everything you want in a nice racing game. As a dev myself, I’m very impressed!

This game is unbelievable. It is like you are driving a remote control car, and the details with the cars and track are fantastic.  As a bonus, in my opinion, there are a forklift and dump truck to drive to, and it is quite challenging but a lot of fun.   Highly recommend this game!

Both me and my 6 yr old son have been playing this.  The devs just make everything work so well.  Easy to build and enough variety to keep you coming back.  Great selection of community tracks and the mission tracks are plentiful.  This is the best example I know of of what the future of MR is.  You can safely move around our entire basement and make a 30' track (planning to do that for his bday in April).  Hoping for some paid DLC for this one...more track packs specifically ;)
It would be nice to create the tracks on the PC and pass them to the app on meta quest.

reviews.review_title: Great experience, better than I expected
reviews.review_description: Perhaps the craziest part is I’ve just been having fun playing the default levels in the different driving perspectives, in VR and MR. Especially the third set of tracks that have the Kawaii style — everything looks so good and is quite polished. There’s still a lot to go but I’ve been blown away by how well everything just works and looks and feels. I’m sure it’ll only be more fun once everything is unlocked and I make my own or try a community track too. Great job!!

This is a cool Hot Wheels/Matchbox style game that had me giddy the first time playing. Being able to walk around the track and race like an RC car or jump in the driver's seat was so cool, I felt like a kid again. It's simple in its premise and is executed very well. Highly recommend!

Cons:
Don’t require an internet connection if I’m playing a game in sandbox mode.

I got it so my son and I can play and I’ll need to buy a second copy of the game if we want to play together (I don’t mind needing an internet connection for this).

Pros: game is lots of fun and a great example of what mixed reality can do

I have been saying I was going to buy this game for the longest. Then I went and bought games that came after it Downtown Club and Galaxy Kart and Galaxy Kart is fun but this game Track Craft is special even if it just has joystick steering. It’s so magical it makes you feel like a kid again me and my nephew had so much fun playing today and I was also in awe of the mixed reality custom tracks I mean sheesh they’re HUGE with a lot of different things it’s better than real life toy car tracks but then I accidentally hit the button and put myself in the driver seat and that’s when I knew this was perhaps one of the best racers I played. It’s like the Hotwheels games that recently came out on consoles but better 10 out of 10

developer_response.body:
Don't feel bad - thank you for this fantastic review! We’re thrilled that Track Craft brought back that magical, kid-like joy and that you and your nephew had so much fun.  
Your support means so much—enjoy building more custom tracks!

reviews.review_description: Most fun i've had in VR in awhile!  Love that you have 3 cameras views, including first person to test your VR stomach stamina.  Trying to get 3 stars leaves a lot of replay value too!

reviews.review_title: Like an RC Car I Can't Destroy!
reviews.review_description:
I love this game! I just played it for 30 minutes. I only stopped to come  here to the store and leave a review :) I wanted to buy any additional DLC the game offered just to support the creators. This is so awesome.

It is like having an RC carthat doesn't break, has low gravity, and superior controlability. 

I love making the track microsize when sitting on my couch or gigantic when I want my car to drive accross the room. It even has FPV mode. I have some little real life FPV cars that are fun, but they are always getting stuck, getting hair in the axels, and the live video feed is terrible quality. Having this VR experience has been like a dream RC car without ANY OF THE PROBLEMS that come with real RC driving. I can't recommend this game enough. :)

carlthewinner :)

Really wasn't reading the prompts as I played and tried things in the environment, found that it very intuitive if you have played other car games OR controlled a remote controlled car.  Had a lot of fun and geeked out a bit with the level details.  One I'll share is grabbing the car and moving it close to your face, you can see the details marking like a hotwheels like car and cute details on the car... like exhaust fumes.   Really neat you can pick the car off the floor and place back on the track.  Really neat and can't wait to spend more time with it.

reviews.review_title: One of the better games out their.
reviews.review_description: This is a very good mixed reality game. The "Adventure" Mode is very fun and does not take 2 hours to complete. It Fun for the price. Also another fun feature, hints the name you can build your own track, But the only down side I am seeing is you can get very motion sick. Other than the motion sicknes part, very fun game

Best car 🚗 game. Well done 
e 👌 brilliant game .well worth the money.  I love to  have the choice playing this game ,just racing around fixed to the track. Defs that would be 10 stars 🌟

developer_response.body: Thanks and sorry to see we only got 2 stars from the 10 mentioned in the review :))

reviews.review_description: Very nice Mixed reality game.  Love the devs tracks.  finished all !

reviews.review_title: Is 0.5 Numbers Away to Be perfect
reviews.review_description:
The game is a "I do NOT Regreted to bought it" Its a great Game also the HotWheels/MatchBox while unlocking cars is a nice detail, please consider the games F Zero X and GX to add more part track variants like a half pipe,Mines,Cylinders,Moving obstacles,sand obstacles,Ice Roads,Magnet,CraneCable transport! Etc
Also needs floating decorations or make the drones stable when moving
Fireworks,lighting,flames,sponsor ads
And maybe a mk ballon fight
And water or lava for level scrolling

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the great suggestions! We’re currently reviewing what content to include in our next update, so your input is extremely helpful.

Have fun racing! :)

reviews.review_title: This is a must have game!!!!
reviews.review_description: Probably the most fun I have had in VR! Every aspect of this game is so great, it’s like collecting miniature cars but instead of racing them down a plastic track you drive them remotely or jump inside a drive it yourself! Scale the track big or small, play in mixed reality in your own environment or completely in VR this is a fantastic use of VR and is so addicting 5 stars!!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the amazing review! We also love the scaling—someday you play on the smallest scale (even sitting on the couch), and some other day it is time for a bigger scale!

See you on the racetracks!

reviews.review_description:
Well, I was proven wrong in about 10 mins. I have to be honest, I was not initially impressed when I saw the training levels, then the new maps and vehicles kicked in, and I was hooked. I played until my batteries died. Essential MR. Addictive. Fun Quirky driving mechanics. A great game for travelling or showcasing MR to people. 
My only issue is the hand controls for selection or manouvering the track. I would prefer a point and click option.

Dev response - the actual training levels and playability are absolutely fine and explain the controls well, it is the aesthetics let the first levels down a bit.  A nicer looking car and tracks would create a better impression. The later levels have far more polish. First impressions are important!

developer_response.body:
Regarding the controls—we understand, and even within our team, opinions are divided on this.

As for the first training levels, is there anything specific you’d suggest we improve or approach differently?

reviews.review_title: Great but multiplayer needs more options
reviews.review_description: Great game pretty fun. But you need to improve the multiplayer parts including the lobby, we need to be able to choose track, and even better to be able to play with community created tracks in multiplayer. I didnt find this option. We can only play time trial to compare time with friends in community mode. I hope you will include this in a future update! You will have far more player playing this game online with that option

developer_response.body: Hey Trix! Glad you like Track Craft! Yes, we know multiplayer still has a lot of space for improvement, including the features you mention. Both are on our roadmap; it just takes a lot of work to implement, so stay tuned ;)

reviews.review_title: Wakes up & excites the little boy in me
reviews.review_description:
If you are comfortable with RC car controls, this is a blast. Many different tracks, very differently behaving vehicles, intuitive move/ zoom/ … controls, very nice/ fitting graphics.
Once starting I get lost in time, seldomly happens in other games.
Not sure if it is good for somebody not having driven RC cars (which inverts the controls directions if going opposite direction).

reviews.review_title: It got me sold on mr
reviews.review_description:
I was not very convinced about mixed reality but for me this game got it absolutely right.
It is great to see the little tracks and cars in 3d in your living room.
The controls needs some getting used to but once in hands they are very fun.
I do not use the 3rd and 1st person view as it defeat the games concept but it could be fun to be able to watch replay after we finish a track and check those camera angles.
The game is too great to remove one star but I have one complaint, some level are extremely hard to get 3 stars, one of them in the first pack with a truck you need to do 15 seconds and pick up 3 stuff (echo something in the name). Even the world first don't have 3 stars.
Buy this game, we need to populate the multiplayer.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a great review! And sorry for the 3 star problem. We also noticed some of the times were a bit too challenging. Now 3 stars should be quite achievable on every track with a bit of practice.

reviews.review_description: The actual game is great with awesome graphics and the ability to build your own tracks. I look for games my gf and I can play together and it worked fine when building a track. Only thing I didn't like is not being able to race on the built track together. I was under the impression from the trailer that you could do this. Only way to play together is through some pre built  tracks in multi-player mode. It would be great if you could update this and make it happen.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for the review. You can race on a track you built together. You just need to hit Test Drive.

reviews.review_title: Not what I was expecting at all
reviews.review_description: Should have watched more gameplay of this I guess, but it isn't an RC racing game at all, just a wacky controlling 5-30 second puzzle course.  I was wanting to race RC cars with my friends but there's not really any racing here, just short over the top tracks with crazy physics.

developer_response.body:
We are sorry to hear that you didn't choose the right game! You can race your friends in multiplayer.

One-star reviews hurt the game creators and the decision of choosing a game is up to you ;) Better luck choosing a good title for you next time!

reviews.review_title: I bought as soon as it launched
reviews.review_description: And it was great value then. Now it's a must by for everyone. It's something you keep coming back to.

I was given a copy of this game by the developers and just absolutely fell in love with it. Brought me back to the days of slot car racing and micro machines.  Add the extra elements of Leader Boards and custom tracks and you will have a hard time keeping up with all the new content. Great game.
This game is awesome for the price. Wow so cool what they have done in this game. Great job devs.

reviews.review_title: Buy a game and have demo
reviews.review_description: Wow what a crap, buy a game and be not able to play the builder untill 35 stars? I understand the single player but the builder?

developer_response.body: Hey! Sorry to hear that this got you frustrated! New version where the builder and community & multiplayer are unlocked after the tutorial is now in testing. Head over to our Discord if you want to try it earlier!

reviews.review_description: Been playing video games since 1976 (Pong) and have played thousands of games since then. This one definitely belongs in my hall of fame and ranks right up there amongst the most innovative titles ever made. As mentioned by others, the potential for this is massive. Wow, just wow!

developer_response.body: What an honor! And great taste in video games for sure:))

reviews.review_description: Havnt played it yet but i KNOW its gonna be good ive seen videos of it and ive been waiting and waiting and waiting and waiting for a RC car style game and the fact you can make your own tracks or just drive around your room is like a cherry on top of a giant cake. Cant wait to see what yall do with this game in the future 👏👏👏👏
This is exactly what you expect. Perfect game

reviews.review_title: Not for me very disappointing so far.
reviews.review_description: I purchased this game to unwind and possibly play this game in other states with my kids. Why would you take a multi play game and require people to jump through hoops to earn little stars before they can begin having that option. I cant build tracks until I earn stars really really ? Since the meta quest does not have a long battery life and I hate grinding like a little monkey do the same stupid thing over and over it would be nice to rethink how this game  works. Hey mike how many more stars bo you need befor we can build a track and play together ? Ow proudly 600 more stars I should have it in about two to three months. Just use some common sense. And it would be nice if the cars staid on the tracks better and I didn't have to wait 20 to 40 seconds for the car to stop before the track restarts. Im sure if I had the patients to find the right button to rest the track quicker it still grinding like a monkey to me instead of haqving fun. If you have the time and want to discuss ideas on improving this ap with me please let me know im glad to help. Have a good day Phil Q.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, Phil! We had a big drop-off of casual players who needed good onboarding before exploring more advanced features like the editor. This is why we require people to run through a few levels (which takes a maximum of 15 minutes) before going to the editor and multiplayer so they have basic onboarding.

Restarting the car is done with the A or Y button. There is a visual hint, and it's part of the tutorial. No need to wait ;)

We are now working on an update that will make certain features quicker accessible to players like you who prefer a different path - as some players have mentioned this in similar ways as you.

It would be great to chat on Discord in more detail! Feel free to join our channel and write to any team members there. I shared the feedback with the rest of the team, and we'll be happy to hear your thoughts!

reviews.review_title: Not for everyone but potential is there
reviews.review_description:
The game works as advertised but I don’t find the gameplay interesting to keep me playing.

I think the game engine has good potential though, if the gameplay would be similar to MudRunner where you need to scale difficult terrain tp reach destination I would rate 5/5.

developer_response.body:
Hey Longen! I'm sorry to hear that the game didn't keep you playing for longer; I hope we can improve future track packs, and yes, we like MudRunner-like levels, too. There are actually some in Surf Rock track pack that kind of go in that direction ;)

Feel free to join our Discord and drop a few thoughts on what would make the game better - as we have big plans this year in terms of updates and want as much feedback as possible!

reviews.review_description: Good game but car sounds far too quiet

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback; better sound settings in options are coming very, very soon!

reviews.review_title: Very nice MR game (few very minor issues
reviews.review_description:
As other reviewers have said, this game looks great and is very addictive.

There are a few minor issues though: The framerate of the vehicles seems low/choppy - especially if you get closer to them. The game stutters from time to time, especially when moving around the track (quest 3). And the global leader boards for some of the tracks have times that are impossibly low (1 second in some cases when just passing the start line takes 1 second). Maybe the boards have been hacked or times posted are the result of prior bugs?

Don't let these negative points stop you from buying it though as it is a great game which the developers should be proud of :)

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the rating and great notes on things to improve!

The next release will resolve all issues above, we've been working hard the last few weeks to improve performance and  shortcuts ;)

reviews.review_description: I wish there were a vanishing point after you build and play. So for example, you know what type of track it is but just like a video game you don’t see the full track but there’s enough track to see what’s coming up next. Please add a vanishing track mode. So when the car moves so does the track in between the two vanishing points behind and in front.
